title: Django: request
description: Completion of an HTTP request handled by a Django view. Emitted by DjangoHoneybadgerMiddleware after each response.

app.description: Django app name from the URL resolver.

params.description: GET and POST params. Only present when include_params is enabled in insights_config.

request_id.description: Request ID from X-Request-ID header, request.id/request_id attribute, or a generated UUID. Set in event context at request start.
